mapper.update: update submission set code_content = #{codeContent}, commit_hash = #{commitHash}, run_result = #{runResult}, run_time = #{runTime}, pass_count = #{passCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, total_count = #{totalCount}, result_detail = #{resultDetail} where sub_id = #{subId}
mapper.select: select * from submission where user_id = #{userId} and lab_id = #{labId} order by submit_time desc
